creator: tlh@brokenorbit.us
text:
claws-mail-notification 3.9.1

When making configuration changes to the Notification Plugin preferences, settings are not properly stored in ~/.claws-mail/clawsrc resulting in default/reset configurations upon the applications next startup.

Configuration changes for the Claws-Mail application and other plugins, such as Fancy HTML viewer are correctly stored in clawsrc-- bug seems to be limited to the notification plugin-- all configuration sections affected.

How-To-Repeat: From the main application menu, access:
  Configuration -> Preferences

Navigate to:
  Plugins -> Notification

  Choose any configuration section, such a 'Popup'
  Change any setting, apply setting and 'OK' close dialog

Close application and restart -- Configuration options are reset
